title: Natural Resources and Sustainability Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: to hesitate or lose strength when doing something
choices: falter
deceptive
tactic
rounds.answer: falter
rounds.explanation: falter: to hesitate or lose strength when doing something

rounds.prompt: Which word means: to change something slightly to make it better or more suitable
choices: falter
deceptive
modify
rounds.answer: modify
rounds.explanation: modify: to change something slightly to make it better or more suitable

rounds.prompt: Which word means: a quality or feature; or to say that something was caused by
choices: deceptive
attribute
falter
rounds.answer: attribute
rounds.explanation: attribute: a quality or feature; or to say that something was caused by

games.title: Spelling Builder

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.

rounds.answer: pristine

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: to do better than someone or something; to go beyond a limit or expectation
rounds.answer: surpass

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: to gradually teach someone an idea or feeling so it becomes part of their character
rounds.answer: instill

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: She was so naive that she believed every story she heard.
The team used a clever tactic to win the game.
When I saw the broken window, I knew something was amiss.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

to hesitate or lose strength when doing something
making someone believe something that is not true; misleading
